generation.image_prompt: Mystical 1900s lithography tarot card illustration. Clean bold black ink outlines. 2:3 vertical. FULL BLEED: No borders, no text. ANTHROPOMORPHIC: An elegant Taiwan leopard cat standing upright on two legs, wearing a silver knightly tunic and a flowing teal cape. He holds a golden cup forward as if offering a toast. Slender build, sharp facial structure, white ear spots, forehead stripes. Misty morning river background. Full bleed. No borders.
generation.narrative: The Knight of Cups is the Messenger of Instinct—the young leopard cat exploring new territory with grace.

meanings.upright: Happiness, emotional harmony, family, reunion, and a high sense of community.
meanings.reversed: Conflict in relationships, family disagreements, or a disconnection from a group.

ecology.zh: 石虎少年在領地邊緣穿梭，尋找屬於自己的水源與家園。
ecology.en: A juvenile leopard cat traversing territory edges searching for home.

website.excerpt: Under the double rainbow, the leopard cat family finds a home where all life flows in harmony.
website.seo_description: Ten of Cups reimagined as a thriving leopard cat family in a safe, vibrant ecosystem.

meaning.zh: 優雅的追求、浪漫、情感的使者、直覺的引導。
meaning.en: Elegant pursuit, romance, messenger of emotions, intuitive guidance.
